summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for P0-1 Purchase Order Discount & PPN (VAT Input) features. All 36 test cases passed successfully, including discount calculations, PPN breakdown, payment flow, PR→PO conversion, backward compatibility, and data integrity validation.
passed_tests: TC1: PO with item discount (10%) + order discount (5%) + default tax (11% excluded) - all 12 assertions passed
TC1: INVARIANT verified - total_amount=10,000,000 (GROSS, Σ subtotal before discount)
TC1: Discount calculations correct - items_discount=1,000,000, order_discount=450,000, discount_total=1,450,000
TC1: net_subtotal=8,550,000 (total_amount - discount_total)
TC1: PPN 11% excluded - ppn_amount=940,500, grand_total=9,490,500
TC1: outstanding=9,490,500 (equals grand_total, basis for AP)
TC1: item.line_total=9,000,000 (subtotal - discount_amount)
TC2: PO with tax_mode='non_ppn' - ppn_amount=0, grand_total=net_subtotal
TC2: outstanding=net_subtotal (no PPN for non-PKP supplier)
TC3: PO without discounts - discount_total=0, net_subtotal=total_amount
TC3: grand_total=total_amount+PPN (3,330,000 = 3,000,000 + 330,000)
TC5: Partial payment (50% of grand_total) - outstanding reduced correctly, payment_status='partial'
TC5: Full payment (remaining) - outstanding=0, payment_status='paid'
TC5: Payment flow based on grand_total (incl PPN)
TC6: Payables summary retrieved - 10 POs with correct outstanding amounts
TC6: POs with PPN use grand_total as basis (incl PPN) in payables
TC7: PR created and approved successfully
TC7: PR→PO conversion successful with full PPN breakdown
TC7: Converted PO has grand_total=5,994,000, dpp=5,400,000, ppn_amount=594,000
TC7: outstanding=grand_total for converted PO
TC8: Backward compatibility - 9 old seed POs found (PO-00001..PO-00006)
TC8: Old PO financials computed via fallback (no errors)
TC8: Old POs have null breakdown fields (expected behavior)
TC10: Data integrity gate PASSED (exit 0)
TC10: All 119 integrity checks passed
TC10: INV-DB-PO block validated PO breakdown: total_amount==Σsubtotal, net==total-diskon, PPN & grand_total consistent
TC10: 16 PO numbers unique (no duplicates)
Login with admin@kainnusantara.id successful
Setup references successful - entity, warehouse, supplier, products resolved
All discount percentages validated (0 ≤ discount_percent ≤ 100)
All monetary calculations rounded correctly to 2 decimal places
PPN rate 11% applied correctly in excluded mode
DPP (Dasar Pengenaan Pajak) equals net_subtotal
grand_total = net_subtotal + ppn_amount (excluded mode)
Item subtotal = price × quantity (GROSS, invariant maintained)
Order total_amount = Σ item.subtotal (GROSS, invariant maintained)
